import React from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; const listings = [ { id: 1, title: "Cozy Cottage in the Hills", location: "Manali, India", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507525428034-b723cf961d3e?fit=crop&w=800&q=80", price: "₹2,500 / night", }, { id: 2, title: "Beachfront Villa", location: "Goa, India", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506744038136-46273834b3fb?fit=crop&w=800&q=80", price: "₹4,800 / night", }, { id: 3, title: "Luxury Apartment City Center", location: "Mumbai, India", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1522708323590-d24dbb6b0267?fit=crop&w=800&q=80", price: "₹3,200 / night", }, ]; function Home() { return (
{/* ✅ Search Bar */}

Airbnb

{/* ✅ Welcome Section */}

Welcome to Airbnb Clone

Find your perfect stay from our beautiful listings below.

{/* ✅ Listings Section */}
{listings.map((listing) => (

{listing.title}

{listing.location}

{listing.price}

Book Now
))}
); } export default Home;
